articles.title: The elections for the new positions in the FIGC will be called for June 22nd
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, APRIL 02 - Gabriele Gravina announced his resignation as president of the FIGC during the summit with the federal components. The elections for the new positions will be called for June 22 (ANSA).
